ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the species belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum to which the species belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clock_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the measurement belongs to */,
  "clock_name" TEXT /* Name of the clock (e.g., Clock 1, Clock 2) */,
  "clock_type" TEXT /* Type of clock used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clock_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_measurements" (
  "mean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mean measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the mean measurement belongs to */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the measurements */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the mean */,
  "calculation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mean_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mean_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sum_measurements" (
  "sum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sum measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the sum measurement belongs to */,
  "sum_value" INTEGER /* Sum value of the measurements */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the sum */,
  "calculation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sum_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adc_yap1" (
  "adc_yap1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Adcyap1 measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the Adcyap1 measurement belongs to */,
  "adc_yap1_value" INTEGER /* Value of the Adcyap1 measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adc_yap1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adc_yap1_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adc_yap2" (
  "adc_yap2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Adcyap2 measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the Adcyap2 measurement belongs to */,
  "adc_yap2_value" INTEGER /* Value of the Adcyap2 measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adc_yap2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adc_yap2_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
